allow: Bash(python -m py_compile app/config.py app/database.py app/main.py app/core/security.py app/core/deps.py app/schemas/user.py app/routers/auth.py app/routers/users.py app/models/user.py app/models/ml_model.py app/models/prediction.py app/models/transaction.py app/models/promo.py app/worker/celery_app.py)

Bash(DATABASE_URL=postgresql://x:x@localhost/x REDIS_URL=redis://localhost:6379/0 SECRET_KEY=test python -c "
from app.models import User, MLModel, PredictionTask, Transaction, PromoCode, PromoActivation
from app.core.security import hash_password, verify_password, create_access_token, decode_token
from app.schemas.user import UserRegister, UserOut, Token
print\('models OK'\)
print\('security OK'\)
print\('schemas OK'\)

h = hash_password\('secret123'\)
assert verify_password\('secret123', h\)
assert not verify_password\('wrong', h\)
print\('password hashing OK'\)

token = create_access_token\({'sub': '42'}\)
payload = decode_token\(token\)
assert payload['sub'] == '42'
print\('JWT OK'\)
")
